mnemonics: DEEP LEARNING R'S: Remember 'R' for Regression, 'R' for Recognition (image/speech), 'R' for Recommender systems. Deep Learning in R makes it 'R'eally easy.
keyPoints: Deep Learning uses neural networks with many layers to model complex patterns.
Reinforcement Learning involves an agent learning to make decisions by receiving rewards or penalties.
R provides user-friendly packages like 'keras' and 'tensorflow' to easily build and train deep learning models.
commonMistakes: Using too many layers causing overfitting - start simple and increase complexity as needed.
Not preprocessing data correctly - deep learning models require normalized/standardized input data.
Ignoring the learning rate - a poorly chosen rate can prevent the model from converging or cause instability.
